_about: Per-operation perf budgets in nanoseconds for the Rust implementation. measured = `cargo bench --bench hot_path -- --quick` parsed via scripts/parse_criterion.py. baseline_ns is the median (criterion's middle estimate) on the listed runner; tolerance_multiplier sets the budget = baseline_ns * tolerance_multiplier. Linux entry seeded from a CI run on commit 47c231f (ubuntu-24.04). Windows sanitize_payload entry seeded from CI on commit after parse_criterion encoding fix.
